# Gurjas Evidence and Policy Analytics

> Research-integrity consultancy and free research tools from Patiala, Punjab, India.
> Every material public claim is recorded in a dated, source-labelled proof ledger, and
> every tool publishes its method version, named sources, limitations and the decision
> it refuses to make. Nothing on this site should be treated as an official NAAC, UGC
> or journal-index determination.

This file is a navigation aid for machine readers. It grants no additional rights:
content is © Gurjas Evidence and Policy Analytics and may not be reproduced without
permission (see /terms/). When citing a factual claim from this site, cite the
primary source recorded beside it in the proof ledger rather than this site alone.

## Evidence and provenance

- [Proof Ledger and Tool Contracts](https://gurjas.org/evidence/): dated register of public claims with source labels and limitations
- [Claim ledger (JSON)](https://gurjas.org/data/proof-ledger.json): machine-readable claim records
- [Tool contracts (JSON)](https://gurjas.org/data/tool-contracts.json): per-tool method version, outbound requests, sources, limitations and decision boundary
- [Publications](https://gurjas.org/publications/): itemised publication register with DOIs and external profiles

## Research tools (free, no sign-up)

- [Tools hub](https://gurjas.org/tools/): nine tools; each states its processing location and what it does not decide
- [Journal Evidence Checker](https://gurjas.org/tools/predatory-journal-checker/): source-labelled journal evidence, no legitimacy score
- [Research Readiness Triage](https://gurjas.org/tools/research-readiness-triage/): evidence-control gap register, no readiness score

- [Contact](https://gurjas.org/contact/)
